Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigBasicOptionsFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.DefaultTabHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.DefaultTab:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DefaultTabHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.CraftingInfoHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DefaultTab, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ShowCraftingInfo:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.CraftingInfoHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ShowCraftingCost:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ShowCraftingInfo, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ShowCraftingProfit:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ShowCraftingCost, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BASIC_OPTIONS_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BASIC_OPTIONS_TEXT; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorDropDownMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DEFAULT_TAB_TEXT; self.textString = "NONE;SHOPPING_TAB;SELLING_TAB;CANCELLING_TAB;AUCTIONATOR"; self.valuesString = "0;1;2;3;4"; self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("LEFT", self.DropDown, "RIGHT", 15, 0)

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_COST; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_COST_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_COST_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_PROFIT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_PROFIT_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CRAFTING_INFO_SHOW_PROFIT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
